common.error-invalid-rhova-config: Invalid quiz config. Did you select a .rhova file?
common.dropzone-rhova-hint: Drop a .rhova file here, or click to browse

metadata.home-description: Enter the room code and enjoy a quiz together
metadata.start-quiz-description: Start a quiz in 1 click to play with anyone you want
metadata.create-quiz-description: Create a quiz in 1 minute to start playing

start-quiz.title: Start a quiz
start-quiz.file-description: To start a quiz, select a .rhova file from your system. If you don't have one, you can create one from the "<link>create a quiz</link>" page

create-quiz.title: Create a quiz
create-quiz.set-title-description: Pick something that reflects the theme. It will also be used as the filename for your .rhova file.
create-quiz.upload-file-description: Select a .rhova file to edit an existing quiz. If you don't have one, you can create one from the "<link>create a quiz</link>" page.
create-quiz.set-questions-description: Add questions with one correct answer and at least one wrong answer each.
create-quiz.question-placeholder: e.g. Who painted the Mona Lisa?

player-waiting-room.title: You're in!
player-waiting-room.waiting: Waiting for the host to start...

player-question.answer-registered: Your answer has been registered. Waiting for the host.

player-quiz-finished.title: Quiz finished!
player-quiz-finished.play-again: Click on the home button below to play a new quiz

session-pending.title: Host Disconnected
session-pending.description: Host is currently offline, wait for him to reconnect...

host-waiting-room.room-code-instructions: Go to {url} and enter the room code

host-quiz-finished.title: Quiz finished!
host-quiz-finished.average-score: The average player score is {averageScore} out of {numberOfQuestions}.
